INTRODUCING YOUR 2026–2027 SYNCS TOP 4 AND EVENT DIRECTORS🫡

Tim & Jeff leading 💪🧑‍🍳, Robin keeping it tight 🎀, Angela guarding the budget 💸

Plus our AMAZING Tech (Hanna & Daniel) and Social (Vivian & Aaron) Events execs making it all happen behind the scenes.

WELCOME Top 4 and Event Coordinators 💙

INTRODUCING YOUR 2026–2027 SYNCS INDUSTRY & PR TEAMS 🫡

Rebecca, Kerris & Hadi leading Industry 🤝💼
Cynthia, Melissa, Chloe & Daniel shaping PR 📸📝

From the very partnerships you see to the posts you double tap… WELCOME Industry & PR 💙

INTRODUCING YOUR 2026–2027 SYNCS DEVS & REPS 🫡

Vincent, Hugo & Nikhil building systems 💻⚙️

Damien, Richard, Daniel, Robin & Anushka representing the cohort 🎤📣

The voices at the front, and the coding in the back 🎉 Please give a warm WELCOME to our Devs & Reps 💙

What if robots could see, think, and act in the real world just like humans? 🤖

Join us as Dr. William Zhi dives into Embodied AI where robots learn from humans and operate beyond controlled settings.

🧠 Learn how robots pick up skills from just a few demonstrations
🌍 Adapt to new, unpredictable environments
⚙️ And leverage foundation models to improve perception

📅 26 March (Week 5)
⏰ 6–8PM
📍 Boardroom 124, J12 (CSB)

🍕 PEP hours + free food included

Perfect for anyone interested in AI, robotics, or the future of intelligent systems.

#SYNCS #USYD #EmbodiedAI #Robotics
